description_long: This skateboard features a compact, modern deck with a two-tone color scheme: a burnt orange main section and a light gray tail. The deck has a slightly upturned tail and a rounded nose, providing both style and functional kicktail for tricks. The wheels are a vibrant green and appear to be made of polyurethane, attached to black metal trucks. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels. The skateboard is suitable for cruising or short commutes in urban environments, with a sturdy build and smooth finish. Its proportions suggest it is a cruiser-style board, optimized for maneuverability and comfort.
description: A compact skateboard with a burnt orange and light gray deck, green wheels, and black trucks, featuring a minimalistic, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-tone deck, green wheels, and the upturned tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose and the symmetry of the deck's color split.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the orange deck and the raised gray tail.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the upturned tail and the color transition from orange to gray.
attribute_wheel_type: cruiser, green, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard black trucks, no visible branding, top-mount configuration
